task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Cylinder' object is visible in the FreeCAD Tree View (Combo View panel) or a 3D cylinder is visible in the main viewport.

task_completion.description: Set cylinder radius to 15 mm and height to 40 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the Cylinder selected, the Property View (Data tab) shows 'Radius' set to 15.00 mm and 'Height' set to 40.00 mm.

task_completion.description: Create a box with dimensions 40x5x20 mm for the slot
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Box' object is visible in the Tree View, and its Property View shows 'Length' (X) as 40.00 mm, 'Width' (Y) as 5.00 mm, and 'Height' (Z) as 20.00 mm.

task_completion.description: Position the box to pass through the center of the cylinder from Z=10 to Z=30
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Box's Placement/Position properties show x=-20, y=-2.5, z=10, OR the 3D viewport visually shows the box intersecting the exact middle of the cylinder, leaving 10mm of cylinder above and below it.

task_completion.description: Perform a Boolean Cut to create the slotted cylinder
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Cut' object is visible in the Tree View (with Cylinder and Box as its children), and the 3D viewport shows a cylinder with a rectangular hole completely passing through its midsection.
The FreeCAD window title bar, the active tab name, or the root node in the Tree View displays 'slotted_cylinder' or 'slotted_cylinder.FCStd'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeCAD graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the FreeCAD application window with its toolbars, tree view, and 3D viewport, rather than just a terminal window executing a Python script.

integrity.description: The agent actually constructed the 3D geometry.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Tree View shows the construction history (Cylinder, Box, Cut) rather than just an imported static mesh or an empty workspace.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write a script in a text editor to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The primary interaction is within the FreeCAD application itself, not a text editor like nano, vim, or gedit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final slotted cylinder should have a bounding box of approximately 30x30x40 mm. The box used for the cut must be positioned at x=-20, y=-2.5, z=10 to perfectly center the 40x5x20 slot within the cylinder. The resulting geometry will have at least 7 faces (2 modified circular bases, 1 curved lateral surface, and 4 flat inner rectangular faces from the slot). The final volume should be approximately 25,288 mm³.
